raw.raw:
runners:
  verify:
    type: cli-tool
    command: node
    execution:
      disposition: completed
      outcome_state: complete
      evidence_refs:
        - type: receipt
          uri: receipt:harness:verify
          label: harness receipt
      surface_refs:
        - type: artifact_refs
          uri: artifact://verify
